Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class FlowRecordUpdate

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FlowBaseElement
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FlowElement
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FlowNode
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FlowRecordUpdate
public class FlowRecordUpdate extends FlowNode

Java class for FlowRecordUpdate complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FlowRecordUpdate">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowNode">
       <sequence>
         <element name="connector" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowConnector" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="faultConnector" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowConnector" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="filterLogic" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="filters" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowRecordFilter" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="inputAssignments" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowInputFieldAssignment" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="inputReference" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="object" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getFilters

      public List<FlowRecordFilter> getFilters()
      Gets the value of the filters property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the filters property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getFilters().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FlowRecordFilter

      Returns:
      The value of the filters property.

    • getInputAssignments

      public List<FlowInputFieldAssignment> getInputAssignments()
      Gets the value of the inputAssignments property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the inputAssignments property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getInputAssignments().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FlowInputFieldAssignment

      Returns:
      The value of the inputAssignments property.
